title: Blue Canyon 17cm Free Standing Round Swivel Mirror - Chrome Finish - Perfect for Shaving and Applying Makeup - One Side with 3x Magnification - Double Sided Multipurpose Mirror - BA121
description: Product Description Blue Canyon free standing swivel pedestal bathroom mirror. Ideal for shaving or make up. Two refelctive surfaces - one standart, one magnifying. Clear and large enough to see the entire face. Can be used on many occasions - at home, school, office, shop, hotel, travel, camping, etc. It can also be a perfect gift. Safety Warning Handle with care. This product has sharp edges and may break if dropped. Always secure the mirror properly before moving or using it.
